description: Designs, manufactures, and sells analytical and measuring instruments. Semiconductor segment includes mass flow controllers, chemical concentration monitors, reticle/mask particle detection systems, and residual gas analyzers.

_metadata.notes: EBITDA: 65.22B JPY, margin 19.35%. Q4 net income: 8.24B JPY. 8,960 employees. Founded 1945 by Masao Horiba, HQ: Kyoto.
